titleStmt.title: SII 9.82: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 82. (A.R. No. 294 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE TANK-BED IN HIREMAGALAGERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 943, Durmati (= A.D. 1021-22) with no other details, in the reign of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (Jayasiṁha II). It records that the Daṇḍanāyaka Poḻalamayya made to Brahmaṛāśi-Jīya a grant of some land (?). Below this are recorded two more grants. The first registers a gift made to Chandrābharaṇa-Jīya when Jagadēkamalla-Noḷambapallava • • • • • was governing Ballakunde three-hundred and Kudiharavi seventy in Śaka year 955, Śrīmukha. The second registers a gift by Brahmādirāja to god Svayambhudēva in Śaka 956, Bhāva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . saka varuṣa 943 neya durmatisaṁvatsaraṁ pravartise svasti samastabhuva
nāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācandrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire svasti samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati nāyaka
patihitāṁjanēyaṁ phaṇiratnabhūṣaṇaṁ samara gaṇḍaṁ giri
durggamalla siṁganakēśarināmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍa
poḻalamayya mēgaṇageṟe(geṟe)yaśvaya vakhkhāṇajīyara siṣya
brahmarāsijīyargge nelnidhigeṟeya nṛpa kālā
tītasaṁvatsarasataṁga 955 neya śrīmukha gatapañca
mahāsabda pallavānvaya śrī vākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ
śrīmajjagadēkamallanoḷaṁbapallava ballakundemū
nūṟuṁ kudiharavi Erppattuṁ sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadināḷutta caṁ
drābharaṇajīyargge ko
ṭṭa mēgaṇageṟeya pū
rvvakaṁ nelnidhigeṟeya keḷage
ḷagamuṁ khaṇḍuga gaḻde
956 neya bhāvasaṁvatsara
ghaḷeya dityadē
vargge mattaṁ koḷa nūṟa yyuma vo
ndu khaṇḍu radal
śrīmatsa ynū
ṟubaḷḷiya tōṁṭamuṁ yūrmma
ttarkeyyaṁ biṭṭaṁ . svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātya
padavīvirājamāna mānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitra
yasaṁpannarappa śrīmanmaneverggaḍe pallava brahmādirājaṁ
śvayaṁbhudēvargge nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ nelnidhiyakeṟeya ke
ḷage khaṁḍugaveregaṟdiyaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaniṁtī dharmmava pra
tipāḷisidavarge prayāge vāraṇāsiyalaśvamēdhaṁgeyda phaḷama
kkumiṁtī dharmmamanaḷidavargge vāraṇāsiyāḷu sāyira liṁgamuṁ
kavileyuṁ tepaśviyumanaḷida pātakanakku . bahubhirvasu
dhā bhuktā rājabhiśśakarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya
tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ varadattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundhara ṣaṣṭirva
rṣaṣahaśrāṇi mṛṣṭāyāṁ jāyati krimiḥ ḻagina va
khāṇijīyara siṣyaprasiṣyargge caṁdrābharaṇajīya ṇageṟeya
svayaṁbhudēvara dēgulaṁ māḍisi
Digital edition of SII 9.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
